title: erodium cicutarium f. microphyllum
intro: Erodium cicutarium f. microphyllum, also known as small-leaved redstem storksbill or dwarf redstem storksbill, is a subspecies of the redstem storksbill plant, a type of flowering plant in the geranium family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Erodium cicutarium f. microphyllum is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
